summary: Transaction Graph Layer and Processor Spec Workflow testing completed successfully. All 30/30 backend tests passed. All frontend flows working: Processor Specs page (table, filter, search, create/edit/delete, detail panel with Brief/JSON/Prompt tabs), Dashboard Transaction Graph widget (179 nodes, 151 edges, 60 docs), Document Detail Transaction Graph panel (nodes, edges, connections displayed).

minor.issue: Response spec_status was 'draft' instead of 'ready' even though DB was updated correctly - FIXED by re-fetching status after generation

critical_code_review_comments: TransactionGraphService properly implements ADDITIVE graph building - failures never block the pipeline
Edge deduplication works correctly (from_node, to_node, edge_type) - updates confidence if higher
ProcessorSpecService generate_outputs correctly sets status to 'ready' after generation
All routers properly use service singletons with initialization checks
Frontend components properly use data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test specs created and cleaned up during testing. Existing PackingSlipProcessor spec (spec_985cf54b9267) verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transaction Graph has 179 nodes and 150+ edges from 60 ingested documents. Graph stats, nodes, edges, document connections, search, bulk-ingest, manual-ingest, and linkage-bonus endpoints all working. Processor Specs has full CRUD + generation workflow working. Frontend ProcessorSpecsPage at /processor-specs, TransactionGraphWidget in Dashboard Vendor Intelligence tab, TransactionGraphPanel in Document Detail page.

Transaction Graph APIs.GET /api/graph/stats: PASS - Returns total_nodes, total_edges, nodes_by_type, edges_by_type, edges_by_provenance, avg_edge_confidence, documents_in_graph
Transaction Graph APIs.GET /api/graph/nodes: PASS - Lists nodes with optional type filter
Transaction Graph APIs.GET /api/graph/edges: PASS - Lists edges with optional type/provenance filter
Transaction Graph APIs.GET /api/graph/document/{doc_id}/connect: PASS - Returns nodes, edges, connected_documents for a document
Transaction Graph APIs.GET /api/graph/search?reference=VALUE: PASS - Searches by reference value (rejects <2 chars)
Transaction Graph APIs.POST /api/graph/bulk-ingest: PASS - Bulk ingests documents (tested with limit=5)
Transaction Graph APIs.POST /api/graph/document/{doc_id}/ingest: PASS - Manual ingest (404 for missing doc)
Transaction Graph APIs.GET /api/graph/document/{doc_id}/linkage: PASS - Returns has_graph_bonus, graph_bonus, graph_evidence, connected_document_count

Processor Specs APIs.GET /api/processor-specs/list: PASS - Lists specs with optional status filter
Processor Specs APIs.GET /api/processor-specs/{spec_id}: PASS - Gets single spec (404 for missing)
Processor Specs APIs.DELETE /api/processor-specs/{spec_id}: PASS - Deletes spec (verified via subsequent GET)
Processor Specs APIs.POST /api/processor-specs/{spec_id}/gene: PASS - Generates brief, json_spec, prompt; sets status to 'ready'
Processor Specs APIs.POST /api/processor-specs/generate-from-: PASS - Creates and generates from candidate data

ProcessorSpecsPage (/processor-specs).Status summary cards (5): PASS - draft, ready, approved, implemented, rejected
ProcessorSpecsPage (/processor-specs).Specs table: PASS - Name, Doc Type, Status, Fields, Created, Actions columns
ProcessorSpecsPage (/processor-specs).Detail tabs (Brief/JSON/Prompt): PASS - All three tabs switch content
ProcessorSpecsPage (/processor-specs).Create spec form: PASS - All fields present, validation works

Dashboard TransactionGraphWidget.Graph widget card: PASS - Visible in Vendor Intelligence tab

DocumentDetailPage TransactionGraphPanel.Reference nodes list: PASS - Shows bill_of_lading, invoice with values

generate_from_candidate status fix.issue: generate_from_candidate returned draft status in response even though DB was updated to ready
generate_from_candidate status fix.fix: Added re-fetch of spec after generate_outputs to get updated spec_status

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real, no mocking
